public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quartermaster.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a quartermaster still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quartermaster in and around Scarlet Descent Gate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Scarlet Descent Gate workable through the obligations of quartermaster while managing the immediate pressure of shaft collapse in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Scarlet Descent Gate, that usually means carrying shaft collapse, lava surge, crew loss without letting the role of quartermaster visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Kaiva Cindercrest needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Scarlet Descent Gate before trust collapses.
Kaiva Cindercrest can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Kaiva Cindercrest read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Scarlet Descent Gate, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Descent Charter Compacts, Frontier Hammer Companies.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Scarlet Descent Gate: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
